violations.description: Time as a public health control. — --Food was not served or discarded within four hours from the time when the food was removed from temperature control. -Tomatoes and lettuce on make line were time stamped for disposal at 1:27 pm. Found on line at 2:30pm. *Items were disposed of and replaced while on-site.
Manual cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Sanitizer sink found at approximately 150ppm Quat and due for refresh.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Debris/residue at floor drain below back room deep sink. -Debris below make line and behind table next to ice machine. -Dust/debris at some cieling tiles.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Equipment that dispenses liquid/food/ice in unpackaged form was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. -Pink debris at bottom edge of interior panel of the ice machine. -Minimal pink debris at back edge of driver through soda machine ice chute.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. -Fry station and shelf below have grease residue build up. -Residue at side surfaces of under counter and chest freezer. -Smudges/debris at screen on server side of fry station. -Dust/debris build up at bottom of wire shelf storing toilet paper. -Crumb/debris at utility cart surfaces.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc. …) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Floors, walls, and ceiling throughout kitchen due for deep clean, i.e. dust at ceiling vents, splatter at walls at dish pit and grease/debris at floor below shelving units.

Handling and storage of poisonous and toxic materials. — --Secondary container of poisonous or toxic material was not clearly identified to indicated contents. -Spray bottle near mop sink has pinkish/orange contents and is labeled as peroxide cleaner. -2 spray bottles with light blue and darker blue contents at service counter are labeled as peroxide cleaner.
Hot holding and cold holding temperatures maintained, unwrapped food not reserved (5 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
Handwashing, good hygienic practices (5 pts deducted)
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
Thermometers provided, used, clean, and accurate (1 pt deducted)
